metadata.title: Add Watchtower (Nick Fedor Fork)
metadata.description: Adds the actively maintained Nick Fedor fork of Watchtower, a process for automating Docker container base image updates. The original containrrr/watchtower project was archived in December 2025.
metadata.author: bauerpawel

operations.description: Add Watchtower (Nick Fedor Fork) - actively maintained fork with automatic Docker container updates

template.title: Watchtower (Nick Fedor Fork)
template.name: watchtower-nickfedor
template.description: Actively maintained fork of Watchtower. Automatically updates the running version of your containerized apps by monitoring Docker Hub or your own image registry. Pulls new images, gracefully shuts down existing containers, and restarts them with the same options used during initial deployment. Drop-in replacement for the archived containrrr/watchtower.

env.name: WATCHTOWER_CLEANUP
env.label: Cleanup old images
env.description: Remove old images after updating containers.

env.name: WATCHTOWER_POLL_INTERVAL
env.label: Poll interval (seconds)
env.description: Interval in seconds between update checks. Default is 86400 (24 hours).

env.name: WATCHTOWER_LABEL_ENABLE
env.label: Label-based filtering
env.description: Only update containers with the com.centurylinklabs.watchtower.enable=true label.

env.name: WATCHTOWER_MONITOR_ONLY
env.label: Monitor only
env.description: Only monitor for new images, do not automatically update containers.

env.name: WATCHTOWER_INCLUDE_STOPPED
env.label: Include stopped containers
env.description: Also update stopped containers (not only running ones).

template.note:
Actively maintained fork of Watchtower (the original containrrr/watchtower was archived in December 2025).

Documentation: https://watchtower.nickfedor.com/
GitHub: https://github.com/nicholas-fedor/watchtower

By default, Watchtower monitors all running containers and checks for updates every 24 hours. Use environment variables to customize behavior.
